basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Accountant, Hostel Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli has released the official notification for 3 Accountant, Hostel Assistant Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Commerce with 3 years experience. Bachelor's Degree with 1 year experience.
qualification.details: Accountant: Bachelor of Commerce (B. Com) with a minimum of 03 years of experience. Hostel Assistant Manager (Female): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with a minimum of 01-year experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per the minimum wages Act-Highly Skilled (Accountant), As per the minimum wages Act-Skilled (Hostel Assistant Manager)
salary_details.details: Accountant: As per the minimum wages Act-Highly Skilled. Hostel Assistant Manager (Female): As per the minimum wages Act-Skilled.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Tiruchirappalli to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Accountant and Hostel Assistant Manager posts is 21-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Accountant and Hostel Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies. One vacancy is for the Accountant post, and two vacancies are for the Hostel Assistant Manager (Female) post.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For the Accountant post, a Bachelor of Commerce (B. Com) with 3 years of experience is required. For the Hostel Assistant Manager (Female) post, a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with 1 year of experience is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Interested candidates need to apply through the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Accountant and Hostel Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Accountant post will be as per the minimum wages Act-Highly Skilled, and for the Hostel Assistant Manager post, it will be as per the minimum wages Act-Skilled.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for both Accountant and Hostel Assistant Manager posts is contract-based.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located at the National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli, in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu (Pincode: 620015).

faq.question: Q10. Who can apply for the Hostel Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The Hostel Assistant Manager post is specifically for female candidates who possess a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and have at least 1 year of relevant experience.
